name: What **damages** can we claim if a client picks a competitor due to our AI invisibility?
description: **No lawsuits, but track 79% traffic loss from AI.**[1]

mainEntity.name: What **damages** can we claim if a client picks a competitor due to our AI invisibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: **No lawsuits, but track 79% traffic loss from AI.**[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No direct legal damages, but lost opportunities reduce firm revenue measurably.** Track client inquiries dropping 79% from AI summaries.[1] Proves competitive harm indirectly.[3]

**Key factors:**
- Traffic loss metrics
- Competitor dominance in AI
- Revenue correlations
- Attribution challenges

**Document inquiry declines and AI audits for internal cases.** Focus on prevention.[1] **Quantifies urgency for partners.**
